name: sddx
description: Loop-based Spec-Driven Development: dense specs with mandatory oracles, hook-enforced TDD, parallel worktrees, hash-chained receipts.

workspace_mode.title: Workspace mode
workspace_mode.description: Task workspace strategy: worktree | branch | auto

test_globs.title: Test globs
test_globs.description: Space-separated extra globs classified as test files by the TDD gate

exempt_globs.title: Exempt globs
exempt_globs.description: Space-separated extra globs exempt from the RED-phase write block

max_iterations_default.title: Max iterations
max_iterations_default.description: Default stop rule: max loop iterations per task

oracle_runs_default.title: Oracle runs
oracle_runs_default.description: How many times verify executes the oracle; every run must pass (flakiness detection)

red_bash_allow.title: RED Bash allow-list
red_bash_allow.description: Space-separated extra commands the RED-phase Bash gate allows (extends the built-in list, never replaces it)

stuck_threshold.title: Stuck threshold
stuck_threshold.description: Consecutive identical test failures before a task is flagged stuck and escalation is requested

pr_host.title: PR host
pr_host.description: PR-host CLI for `sddx pr create`: gh | glab. Empty auto-detects from the origin remote
